userObservedWarnings: Adwaita-WARNING **: Using GtkSettings:gtk-application-prefer-dark-theme with libadwaita is unsupported. Please use AdwStyleManager:color-scheme instead.
WARNING: radv is not a conformant Vulkan implementation, testing use only.

darkModeWarningBefore.sourceSearchResult: No project source used gtk-application-prefer-dark-theme or prefer-dark-theme, so the warning could not be attributed to current Rust source.

darkModeWarningAfter.styleHandling: Application explicitly sets adw::StyleManager color scheme to Default so libadwaita follows the system style without GTK dark-theme settings.
darkModeWarningAfter.consoleCheck: Warning remains under the user's normal GTK settings because the unsupported flag is loaded from /home/kyo/.config/gtk-4.0/settings.ini. A second check with a temporary GTK config that omits the flag produced no Adwaita warning.

darkModeFix.change: Added libadwaita StyleManager setup with ColorScheme::Default and did not use GtkSettings dark-theme flags.

focusWarningInvestigation.likelyIssueFound: Initial sidebar selection happened before window.set_content, which could run selection/focus work before widgets were rooted.
focusWarningInvestigation.manualInteractionsAttempted: Codex performed timed startup console checks. Full manual interaction could not be automated from this shell session.

focusWarningFix.change: Moved initial sidebar selection after window.set_content and before window.present so the selected row is rooted before selection.

radvWarningDisposition: Observed graphics-stack warning; not treated as an app bug unless rendering issues appear.
consoleCheckCommand: cargo run --bin hyprland-settings 2>&1 | tee /tmp/hyprland-settings-console-check.log && grep -E "Adwaita-WARNING|Gtk-CRITICAL|gtk_window_get_focus|gtk_root_get_focus|radv" /tmp/hyprland-settings-console-check.log || true

normalUserGtkSettings: Adwaita-WARNING remained because gtk-application-prefer-dark-theme=1 is set in the user's GTK settings.
No Gtk-CRITICAL focus warnings were observed during the timed startup check.
temporaryGtkSettingsWithoutPreferDarkThe: No Gtk-CRITICAL focus warnings were observed during the timed startup check.

proofUsed: Source search found no unsupported GTK dark-theme setting usage
src/ui/app.rs uses libadwaita StyleManager with ColorScheme::Default
src/ui/window.rs roots window content before initial sidebar selection
Console check with the user's GTK settings
Console check with a temporary GTK config omitting gtk-application-prefer-dark-theme
proofStillMissing: Full manual GUI interaction was not automated; only timed startup console checks were performed.
The Adwaita warning cannot be removed for the user's normal session without changing the external GTK settings that set gtk-application-prefer-dark-theme=1.
nextRecommendedSprint: If GTK focus warnings recur with exact interaction steps, capture a fresh console log and inspect the matching callback path.
